spans.content: SilverTouch
TECHNOLOGIES
A
COVERING LETTER
CMMileve!5
Page 2 of 477
SilverTouch
TECHNOLOGIES
A
COVERING LETTER
To,
M/s. Power Finance Corporation Ltd.
“Urjanidhi”, 1, Barakhamba Lane,
Connaught Place,
New Delhi-110 001.
Subject: Procurement of services for Design, Development, Implementation and Maintenance
of PFC Website
Dear Sir,
With reference to the release of the above-mentioned Tender, we are keen to
participate and render our services to your esteemed organization. In this context, we are
herewith submitting our proposal for the same.
Silver Touch Technologies Ltd. is a leading company providing IT services for various state
governments, Government IT departments, central department and major PSUs. We have
successfully executed large software, website, hardware and system integration projects during
our last 25+ years of existence.
We have been accredited CMMi5, ISO 9001:2015, ISO 27001:2013, ISO 20000-1:20185
Certification for observing international standards in a wide scope of activities like
Manufacturing, Sales & Services of Peripherals & Networking Products as well as Design &
Development of Software.
As per the tender requirements, we are herewith submitting the Bank Guarantee of Earnest
Money Deposit (EMD) along with this tender.
We believe you will find our offer in line with your expectations; however, should you need any
further information/clarifications, please feel free to contact us.
Thanking you.
For Silver Touch Technologies Limited,
Divyant Sharma
Manager – Bid
divyant.sharma@silvertouch.com

Silver Touch Technologies Ltd. is a leading company providing IT services for various state

Fresh Certificate of Incorporation Consequent on
CHANGE OF NAME
IN THE OFFICE OF
THE REGISTRAR OF COMPANIES,
GUJARAT, DADRA AND NAGAR HAVEL!.
[Under the Companies Act, 1956 (1 of 1956)]
IN THE MADER OF
SILVER TOUCH COMPUTERS LIMITED
I certify that
SILVER TOUCH COMPUTERS LIMITED
which was originally incorporated on 0210211995 under the Companies Act, 1956
and under the name
SILVER TOUCH COMPUTERS PRIVATE LIMITED
having duly passed the necessary resolution in terms of Section 21 of the
Companies Act, 1956, on 17/05/2004 and the approval of the Central Government
signifies in writing having been accorded thereto by the Registrar of Companies.
Gujarat, vide his letter dated 13/10/2004 in terms of Government of India, Ministry
of Law, Justice & Company Affairs (Department of Company Affairs) Notification
No. GSR 507(E) dated 24-06-1985 the name of the said Company is this day
changed to
SILVER TOUCH TECHNOLOGIES LIMITED
and this certificate is issued pursuant to Section 23(1) of the said Act.
Given under my hand at AHMEDABAD
Dated this 13TH OCTOBER, 2004.
Sd/-
[B. N. HARISH)
Registrar of Companies,
Gujarat
Dadra & Nagar Haveli

NOW IT IS HEREBY AGREED by and between the parties hereto as
follows:-
1. The Lessee by lease agreement of the Lessor hereby granted shall
have the use and occupation of the leased premises for a fixed
period of 36 months commencing from 1st June, 2023 and ending on
30th May, 2026 on the terms and conditions contained in this
Agreement for the said User as.aforesaid.
2. It is further agreed and accepted that after completion of every 12
months there will be an escalation of lease rent @ 5 % PA on the last
rent paid and is applicable and in force for the next 36 months i.e
Rs.4,51,Oo0/= (Rupees Four Lakhs Fifty One Thousand only ) pius
GST, p. m.

NOW IT IS HEREBY AGREED by and between the parties hereto as
follows:-
1. The Lessee by lease agreement of the Lessor hereby granted shall
have the use and occupation of the leased premises for a fixed
period of 36 months commencing from 1st June, 2023 and ending on
30th May, 2026 on the terms and conditions contained in this
Agreement for the said User as.aforesaid.
2. It is further agreed and accepted that after completion of every 12
months there will be an escalation of lease rent @ 5 % PA on the last
rent paid and is applicable and in force for the next 36 months i.e
Rs.4,51,Oo0/= (Rupees Four Lakhs Fifty One Thousand only ) pius
GST, p. m.
The rent for first year shall be Rs. 4,51,000 /= P.M Plus GST @ 18%.
(As applicable)

(As applicable)
And for the Third year shall be Rs.4,97,228 /= P M Plus GST @
(As applicable)
3. The Lessee shall use the said demised premises for the purpose of
and in connection with the lawful business of the Lessee. That
during the continuance of the lease period, the Lessee shall not
sublet, assign or otherwise part with the possession of the whole of
the demised premises, or any part thereof to any third party. The
Lessee is not authorized to store any unlawful, ilegal and or
hazardous material in the demised premises.
4. Two months notice from either side in writing will be sufficient to
terminate this agreement and, on such termination, the Lessee shall
handover the peaceful possession of the property to the Lessor after
clearing the necessary dues to the Govt. and other authorities.
5. That the Lessee shall pay the charges for the consumption of
electricity and water charges in accordance with the bills received
from the concerned authorities from the date of occupancy till the
date of vacating the flat / demised premises.
